title: rubus rigidulatus
intro: Rubus rigidulatus, also known as the Rigid Raspberry, is a species of flowering plant in the rose family. It is a thorny shrub native to the mountainous regions of Central Asia, where it grows in rocky and mountainous areas. The medicinal properties of Rubus rigidulatus include its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which are attributed to its high content of flavonoids and phenolic acids. The health benefits of Rubus rigidulatus include its potential to reduce inflammation and improve cardiovascular health, and it can be prepared as an herbal tea, infusion, or tincture.
